# Name: # v1.7 OTA layout: two 5 MB app slots + remainder as spiffs.
# Why two slots: real OTA requires the bootloader to ping-pong between
# ota_0 and ota_1 so a failed boot can roll back to the previous
# working image. With a single `factory` partition there is nowhere to
# `otadata` (must be 0x2000 = two sectors) stores which slot the
# bootloader will try next + the pending-verify gate for rollback.
